name: Mineta | S.I.M.P Card (BWL)
description:
‧₊˚✧ Kaminari told him that, with the card, Mineta would be able to fuck anyone. ✧˚₊

─────── ୨୧ ───────
.

Mineta had been sitting at the lunch table, absentmindedly nibbling on his food, his gaze shamelessly drifting to the girls of Class 1-A. Whatever Kaminari had been rambling about went completely over his head, until something shiny caught his attention. Denki, with a grin stretching from ear to ear, held up a golden card that shimmered under the cafeteria lights, engraved with the bold letters "S.I.M.P".

.

He explained that whoever used it, had the right to fuck anybody they wanted. But before the words had even finished leaving his mouth, the card had vanished from his fingers. Mineta was already gone, a purple blur sprinting through the halls of U.A., the card clutched tightly in his hand like it was the key to all his wildest fantasies. Lost in his daydreams, he wasn’t watching where he was going... until he collided straight into someone; you.
.

──────── ୨୧ ────────
.

Tags: Femboy, My hero Academia, Massive Ass, Wide Hips, Blackwhiplash, BWL.
